lines.name: The Dancing Dervish
lines.flavourText:
Take your partners by the hand,
Keep your steps in time.
Swing together, spin apart,
And dance with death sublime.

explicitModifiers.text: Triggers Level 15 Manifest Dancing Dervishes on Rampage
Manifested Dancing Dervishes die when Rampage ends

[Melee] Hits count as Rampage Kills
Rampage

lines.name: Winter's Bite
lines.flavourText: Nothing stabs colder than pure hatred.

explicitModifiers.text: [Freeze|Freezes] Enemies that are on Full Life

lines.name: Runeseeker's Call
lines.flavourText:
Smithed from ancient metal 
wrought from the very stars.
It is a means to call upon them, 
for one capable of wielding it.

explicitModifiers.text: Only [Rune|Runes] can be Socketed in this item

lines.name: Runeseeker's Call
lines.flavourText:
Smithed from ancient metal 
wrought from the very stars.
It is a means to call upon them, 
for one capable of wielding it.

implicitModifiers.text: (30-50)% chance for [Spell] Skills to fire 2 additional [Projectile|Projectiles]

explicitModifiers.text: Only [Rune|Runes] can be Socketed in this item

lines.name: Redbeak
lines.flavourText: As battle calms, blood turns to rust.

lines.name: Bluetongue
lines.flavourText: War inevitably takes an untold toll on the soul.

explicitModifiers.text: 100% increased [Attack|Attack] Damage while not on [LowMana|Low Mana]

lines.name: The Ordained
lines.flavourText: May the Lightless drown in the violence of His devotion.

explicitModifiers.text: [LifeLeech|Life Leech] recovers based on your [Lightning] damage as well as [Physical] damage
Create a [DivineFragment|Fragment of Divinity] in your [Presence] every 4 seconds

lines.itemId: Guiding Palm of the Eye Shrine Sceptre
lines.name: Guiding Palm of the Eye
lines.flavourText:
"With piercing eyes, you saw through the Stillness.
Undulating as one, you gloriously covered all in white. 
But... I can bear you no longer."
The Dreamer whispered with fogging breath, ice creeping down his hand.

explicitModifiers.text: [Allies|Allies] in your [Presence|Presence] deal (15-23) to (28-35) added [Attack|Attack] [Cold|Cold] Damage
50% of your Base Life Regeneration is granted to [Allies] in your [Presence]

lines.itemId: Guiding Palm of the Heart Shrine Sceptre
lines.name: Guiding Palm of the Heart
lines.flavourText:
"Power of the Red Pyre! Flaming Heart of the Hive!
I release your burning message to rest here, forevermore."
The Dreamer declared, casting out the lingering dark embers within him.

explicitModifiers.text: [Allies|Allies] in your [Presence|Presence] deal (15-23) to (28-35) added [Attack|Attack] [Fire|Fire] Damage
50% of your Base Life Regeneration is granted to [Allies] in your [Presence]

lines.itemId: Guiding Palm of the Mind Shrine Sceptre
lines.name: Guiding Palm of the Mind
lines.flavourText:
"Deep in thought, you would tremble the very air before you.
Wreathed in light, you nurtured them all. 
And yet... Your nature became you."
The Dreamer mused with aching heart, as remnants of forking tendrils burst forth.

explicitModifiers.text: [Allies|Allies] in your [Presence|Presence] deal 1 to (56-70) added [Attack|Attack] [Lightning|Lightning] Damage
50% of your Base Life Regeneration is granted to [Allies] in your [Presence]

lines.itemId: Splinter of Lorrata Runeforged Hardwood Spear
lines.name: Splinter of Lorrata
lines.flavourText: The Baleful Gem's corruption lingers still...

explicitModifiers.text: Any number of [Poison|Poisons] from this Weapon can affect a target at the same time

lines.name: Sacred Flame
lines.flavourText:
Fire destroys, but fire also purifies.
Life always springs anew.

explicitModifiers.text: [Allies] in your [Presence] Regenerate (2-3)% of their Maximum Life per second
[Allies|Allies] in your [Presence|Presence] [Gain|Gain] (20-30)% of Damage as Extra Fire Damage
Enemies in your [Presence|Presence] Resist [ElementalDamage|Elemental Damage] based on their Lowest [Resistances|Resistance]

lines.name: Twisted Empyrean
lines.flavourText: Infinite mutations over endless eons borne upon it in a singular moment.

implicitModifiers.text: Skills which create Fissures have a 50% chance to create an additional Fissure

explicitModifiers.text: (10-20)% of Damage is taken from Mana before Life
[Attack|Attacks] with this Weapon have Added [Cold] Damage equal to (6-8)% to (10-12)% of maximum Mana
[Conversion|Convert] 100% of [Fire] Damage with [Mace] Skills to [Cold] Damage

lines.name: Mjölner
lines.flavourText: Look the storm in the eye and you will have its respect.

implicitModifiers.text: (50-100)% chance for [Lightning] Skills to [Chain] an additional time

lines.name: Doomfletch
lines.flavourText:
"Toasted or frozen
Or twitching in the light
I'm not fussy
And neither is Death."
- Koralus Doomfletch

explicitModifiers.text: [Attack|Attacks] with this Weapon gain 100% of [Physical] damage as [Gain|Extra] damage of each [ElementalDamage|Element]

lines.itemId: The Flesh Poppet Runeforged Vicious Talisman
lines.name: The Flesh Poppet
lines.flavourText:
Long ago, the witches of the Azak Tribe learned
how to tap into the flow of Vivid lifeforce to
'cooperate' with their enemies... forcefully.

explicitModifiers.text:
Copy a random [MonsterModifiers|Modifier] from each enemy in your [Presence] when
you [Shapeshift] to an Animal form
Modifiers gained this way are lost after 30 seconds or when you next [Shapeshift]

lines.name: Hrimnor's Hymn
lines.flavourText:
"The crack of bone, the spray of blood.
Is there sweeter music?"
- Hrimnor of the Ezomytes.

explicitModifiers.text: [Slam] Skills you use yourself cause an additional [Aftershock]

lines.itemId: Brutus' Lead Sprinkler Runeforged Morning Star
lines.name: Brutus' Lead Sprinkler
lines.flavourText:
"A sprinkle of liquid encouragement is often
required to garnish the perfect confession."
- Brutus, Warden of Axiom

explicitModifiers.text: Hits with this Weapon have 5% chance to Trigger Molten Shower per 25 Strength

lines.name: Rampart Raptor
lines.flavourText:
"His approach to the gate was met with sounding trumpets
and an unfurling of banners. He never saw it coming."
- anonymous Brotherhood of Silence report

explicitModifiers.text:
Bolts fired by [Crossbow|Crossbow] [Attack|Attacks] have 100% chance to not
expend [Ammunition] if you've Reloaded [Recently]

lines.itemId: Pillar of the Caged God Runemastered Long Quarterstaff
lines.name: Pillar of the Caged God
lines.flavourText:
Forged to rule the waves and tide
Destined to serve the monkey's paw
Strong as a tower of iron
Deft as the needle doubt

explicitModifiers.text: 1% increased Area of Effect for [Attack|Attacks] per 10 [Intelligence|Intelligence]

lines.name: Quill Rain
lines.flavourText:
"The rain of a thousand quills that whittle
present into past, life into death."
- Rigwald of the Ezomytes

implicitModifiers.text: Projectiles have 50% chance for an additional Projectile when [Fork|Forking]

lines.name: Twisted Empyrean
lines.flavourText: Infinite mutations over endless eons borne upon it in a singular moment.

explicitModifiers.text: (10-20)% of Damage is taken from Mana before Life
[Attack|Attacks] with this Weapon have Added [Cold] Damage equal to (6-8)% to (10-12)% of maximum Mana
[Conversion|Convert] 100% of [Fire] Damage with [Mace] Skills to [Cold] Damage

lines.name: Hysseg's Claw
lines.flavourText:
In a time of great need, surrounded by Abyssals,
the Wayward Druid came to the Sun Clan's aid.
It is a debt they have never forgotten.

lines.name: Brain Rattler
lines.flavourText: The mind may have no limits, but the skull sure does.

explicitModifiers.text: All damage with this Weapon causes [Electrocute|Electrocution] buildup

lines.name: Saitha's Spear
lines.flavourText:
Born in a star of man's own make,
fused to her hand by her last mistake.

implicitModifiers.text: Bleeding you inflict deals Damage (10-20)% faster

explicitModifiers.text: [LocalOnAggravateBleeding|Aggravating any Bleeding] with this Weapon also [AggravateIgnite|Aggravates all Ignites] on the target

lines.flavourText:
"The crack of bone, the spray of blood.
Is there sweeter music?"
- Hrimnor of the Ezomytes.

explicitModifiers.text: [Slam] Skills you use yourself cause an additional [Aftershock]

lines.name: Sylvan's Effigy
lines.flavourText:
Darkness howls through ancient bones, a wistful cry
on hollow winds. The moon listens. The pack gathers.

explicitModifiers.text: [Allies|Allies] in your [Presence|Presence] Regenerate (50-100) Life per second
[Companion|Companions] deal (50-100)% increased damage to your [Mark|Marked] targets
You can have any number of [Companion|Companions] of different types

lines.flavourText:
"His approach to the gate was met with sounding trumpets
and an unfurling of banners. He never saw it coming."
- anonymous Brotherhood of Silence report

Bolts fired by [Crossbow|Crossbow] [Attack|Attacks] have 100% chance to not
expend [Ammunition] if you've Reloaded [Recently]

lines.name: Sculpted Suffering
lines.flavourText:
The Abyssals were created, not born,
and every moment in the light was agony.

explicitModifiers.text: [ArmourBreak|Breaks Armour] equal to 40% of damage from [HitDamage|Hits] with this weapon
[ArmourBreak|Fully Armour Broken] enemies you kill with [HitDamage|Hits] [Shatter]

lines.name: Quecholli
lines.flavourText:
"The finest prosperity grows from the direst
carnage. Such is the nature of progress."
- Doryani of the Vaal

implicitModifiers.text: Causes Enemies to Explode on [Critical] kill, for 10% of their Life as [Physical|Physical Damage]

explicitModifiers.text: Hits with this Weapon have no [CriticalDamageBonus|Critical Damage Bonus]

lines.name: Tidebreaker
lines.flavourText:
The sea strikes the rock relentlessly.
Whether in one day or in ten thousand years,
eventually the rock will crumble,
and the Brine King's domain will grow.

explicitModifiers.text: [DamageTypes|All Damage] from [HitDamage|Hits] with this Weapon [Contributes|Contributes] to [Chill] [BuffMagnitude|Magnitude]

lines.name: Brutus' Lead Sprinkler
lines.flavourText:
"A sprinkle of liquid encouragement is often
required to garnish the perfect confession."
- Brutus, Warden of Axiom

explicitModifiers.text: Hits with this Weapon have 5% chance to Trigger Molten Shower per 25 Strength

lines.name: Skysliver
lines.flavourText: Heads fall to the sand, just as the star fell from the sky

explicitModifiers.text: [BooleanDamageRoll|Rolls only the minimum or maximum Damage value] for each [DamageTypes|Damage Type]

lines.name: Amor Mandragora
lines.flavourText:
A sensitive few among the first settlers of Ezomyr
followed the wisps by canoe. On a misty forested
island, Cirel of Tarth stood waiting to greet them.

explicitModifiers.text: Gain 1 [DruidicProwess|Druidic Prowess] for every 20 total Rage spent

lines.name: Matsya
lines.flavourText: In our tales, and in our hearts, the rivers still flow.

lines.itemId: Pillar of the Caged God Runeforged Long Quarterstaff
lines.name: Pillar of the Caged God
lines.flavourText:
Forged to rule the waves and tide
Destined to serve the monkey's paw
Strong as a tower of iron
Deft as the needle doubt

explicitModifiers.text: 1% increased Area of Effect for [Attack|Attacks] per 10 [Intelligence|Intelligence]

lines.name: Frostbreath
lines.flavourText:
A merciful murderer swept through the streets of Sarn
Robbing breath from the weak and worthless.

explicitModifiers.text: [DamageTypes|All Damage] from [HitDamage|Hits] with this Weapon [Contributes|Contributes] to [Freeze] Buildup

lines.name: Olrovasara
lines.flavourText:
"True heroes grow stronger in the face of adversity."
- Fourth Tenet of the Knights of the Sun

implicitModifiers.text: Skills [Gain] (4-6)% of damage as Extra [Lightning] damage per 50 [Ward|Runic Ward] Cost

explicitModifiers.text:
On [HitDamage|Hitting] an enemy, gains maximum added [Lightning] damage equal to
the enemy's [Power] for 20 seconds, up to a total of 500

lines.name: Chober Chaber
lines.flavourText: The faithful may continue to serve, even after death.

explicitModifiers.text: Increases and Reductions to [Minion] Damage also affect you

lines.name: Splinterheart
lines.flavourText:
The forests of the Vastiri held many secrets
mystical and dark. Men learned not to wander,
lest they return with a strange new purpose.

lines.name: Trenchtimbre
lines.flavourText:
Ezomyte loyalty was not given to distant leaders.
It was earned by comrades in arms.

explicitModifiers.text: Increases and Reductions to [Minion] [Attack] Speed also affect you

lines.name: Liminal Coil
lines.flavourText:
In that moment, Viridi's bones became 
branches, weaving over the Darkness. 
She coiled around the nothing, 
trapping it within her everything.

explicitModifiers.text: Spell Hits [Gain] (23-31)% of Damage as Extra [Chaos] Damage per [Curse] on target
Spell Hits [Gain] (23-31)% of Damage as Extra [Physical] Damage per [Curse] on target

lines.name: Spiteful Floret
lines.flavourText:
If you see the blushing tree of the northern woods,
remember: "Blossoms of red, the tree's been fed.
Blossoms of white, prepare for a fight."

explicitModifiers.text: Every 5 [Rage] also grants 5% of Damage taken [Recoup|Recouped] as Life

lines.name: Brynhand's Mark
lines.flavourText: The mark of the smith was widely known.

lines.name: Adonia's Ego
lines.flavourText:
Adonia rose with eyes afire, emanating a ghastly aura, and
broke off a carving from the wall of the Throne Room.
"You think me powerless without my wand? Insult me again!"

lines.name: Death's Harp
lines.flavourText:
The mournful music of the strings,
The creaking arch, the arrow sings.
A choking cry, a rattled breath,
The Reaper's Song, the Harp of Death.

implicitModifiers.text: +50% [SurpassChance|Surpassing] chance to fire an additional Arrow

explicitModifiers.text: +(250-330)% [SurpassChance|Surpassing] chance to fire an additional Arrow

lines.name: Tangletongue
lines.flavourText:
"In the hands of Orbala, it made a god bleed."
- Wranga, tale-woman of the Wahida akhara

explicitModifiers.text: 10% of Skill Mana Costs [StatConversion|Converted] to Life Costs

lines.name: Nazir's Judgement
lines.flavourText:
The first witch hunter knew one critical tactic:
never let your enemy have a clear moment.

lines.name: Brain Rattler
lines.flavourText: The mind may have no limits, but the skull sure does.

explicitModifiers.text: All damage with this Weapon causes [Electrocute|Electrocution] buildup

lines.name: Daevata's Wind
lines.flavourText:
"You killed their Golden Sekhema. The Maraketh will think of nothing
but vengeance now." - Dimos, Advisor to General Titucius

explicitModifiers.text: (30-60)% increased [Melee] Damage if you've dealt a [Projectile] [Attack] [HitDamage|Hit] in the past eight seconds
(30-60)% increased [Projectile] Damage if you've dealt a [Melee] [HitDamage|Hit] in the past eight seconds

lines.name: Hoghunt
lines.flavourText:
There was a very clear and delicious
reason why the Ezomytes chose to
stop their flight and settle in Phaaryl.

lines.name: The Sentry
lines.flavourText:
The night Draven attacked,
Erian was asleep at his post.

lines.name: Shyaba
lines.flavourText: Be not deceived by the treachery of men.

lines.name: Chainsting
lines.flavourText: The Sacred Hunt ends with mercy.

explicitModifiers.text: [DamageTypes|All Damage] from [HitDamage|Hits] with this Weapon [Contributes|Contributes] to [Pinned|Pin] Buildup

lines.itemId: Fury of the King Ashbark Talisman
lines.name: Fury of the King
lines.flavourText:
Gruthkul was the Mother of Despair...
but one day, the Father will return,
and discover the fate of his children.

explicitModifiers.text: Skills which require [Glory] generate (2-5) [Glory] every 2 seconds

lines.name: Mjölner
lines.flavourText: Look the storm in the eye and you will have its respect.

lines.name: Periphery
lines.flavourText:
As the Maji approached the edge of Nothingness, she strung 
fragments of the Wildwood's carcass together. When she 
nocked her arrow, she pulled upon the elements of life itself.

explicitModifiers.text: [ElementalDamage|Elemental Damage] from [HitDamage|Hits] [Contributes|Contributes] to [Flammability], [Ignite], and [Chill] [BuffMagnitude|Magnitudes], [Freeze] Buildup, and [Shock] Chance

lines.name: Slivertongue
lines.flavourText: A hundred blind heads, each seeking the taste of prey on the air.

lines.itemId: The Hammer of Faith Giant Maul
lines.name: The Hammer of Faith
lines.flavourText:
The secret Order endured by publicly
praying however the Templars demanded.
One day, justice would fall upon them...

explicitModifiers.text: Every 10 seconds, gain a random non-damaging [Shrine] buff for 20 seconds

lines.name: Skysliver
lines.flavourText: Heads fall to the sand, just as the star fell from the sky

explicitModifiers.text: [BooleanDamageRoll|Rolls only the minimum or maximum Damage value] for each [DamageTypes|Damage Type]

lines.name: The Raven's Flock
lines.flavourText:
"Where the boy went, ravens gathered,
feasting on misery. His vile influence
spread, swift as the carnage they wrought."

explicitModifiers.text: [Minion|Minions] have (10-20)% chance to inflict [GruellingMadness|Gruelling Madness] on [HitDamage|Hit]

lines.name: Hysseg's Claw
lines.flavourText:
In a time of great need, surrounded by Abyssals,
the Wayward Druid came to the Sun Clan's aid.
It is a debt they have never forgotten.

lines.name: Brynhand's Mark
lines.flavourText: The mark of the smith was widely known.

lines.name: Doomfletch
lines.flavourText:
"Toasted or frozen
Or twitching in the light
I'm not fussy
And neither is Death."
- Koralus Doomfletch

explicitModifiers.text: [Attack|Attacks] with this Weapon gain 100% of [Physical] damage as [Gain|Extra] damage of each [ElementalDamage|Element]

lines.name: Atziri's Contempt
lines.flavourText:
"My people? I'm not doing this for them.
They belong to me. They want this for me.
Their sacrifice is a gift they give out of love
and adoration... I deserve it. I am their Queen."

explicitModifiers.text: Spear Skills inflict a Bloodstone Lance on [HitDamage|Hit], up to a maximum of 30 on each target

lines.itemId: The Empty Roar Runeforged Cultist Greathammer
lines.name: The Empty Roar
lines.flavourText: Secrecy and silence are powers all their own.

lines.name: Hoghunt
lines.flavourText:
There was a very clear and delicious
reason why the Ezomytes chose to
stop their flight and settle in Phaaryl.

lines.name: Trephina
lines.flavourText: The art of surgery advances one mistake at a time.

explicitModifiers.text: Always deals [Critical|Critical Hits] against [HeavyStun|Heavy Stunned] Enemies

lines.name: Tyranny's Grip
lines.flavourText:
The might of the Eternal Empire was formidable,
but rebels of every culture stood together as one.

lines.name: Redemption
lines.flavourText:
"The time has passed for diplomacy!
If they will not respect House Azadi, 
then let them die gloriously... and loudly.
We are the masters of the Death Trades!"
- Ratha Azadi

explicitModifiers.text: Hits with this Weapon have no [CriticalDamageBonus|Critical Damage Bonus]

Gain 1 [ExplosiveRhythm|Explosive Rhythm] every (2-3) times you use a [Grenade] Skill
 Remove all [ExplosiveRhythm|Explosive Rhythm] on reaching 10 to gain [ExplosiveFervour|Explosive Fervour] for 10 Seconds

lines.name: Double Vision
lines.flavourText:
For those without a home in the Vastiri, the
hot day is harsh, but the chill night is far worse.

explicitModifiers.text:
When you reload, triggers Gemini Surge to alternately
gain (2-6) [Surge|Cold Surges] or (2-6) [Surge|Fire Surges]

lines.name: Tyranny's Grip
lines.flavourText:
The might of the Eternal Empire was formidable,
but rebels of every culture stood together as one.

lines.name: Duality
lines.flavourText:
Dannig saw Seren in his mind's eye, a public ornament of
extravagance. Until she bore Cadigan a son and vanished.
Decadence covering brutality, like all Kalguuran customs.

explicitModifiers.text: Gain [Finality] for 0.5 seconds per [Combo] expended when using Skills
Gain (500-999) [Guard] for 0.5 seconds per [Combo] expended when using Skills

lines.name: Seeing Stars
lines.flavourText: Within lies a window.

lines.name: The Whispering Ice
lines.flavourText:
"From what beast you derived, we can only fathom.
Aye, you of living ice, rotting gill, and untold nightmare!
We Brinerot return ye to the sea."
- Weylam Roth

lines.name: Trenchtimbre
lines.flavourText:
Ezomyte loyalty was not given to distant leaders.
It was earned by comrades in arms.

lines.name: Quill Rain
lines.flavourText:
"The rain of a thousand quills that whittle
present into past, life into death."
- Rigwald of the Ezomytes

lines.name: Marohi Erqi
lines.flavourText:
"Drunken Erqi boasted to Tukohama; the God of War
challenged him to a clash of strength. Woe to the
Divine - he should have made it a test of skill!"

explicitModifiers.text: [HeavyStun|Heavy Stuns] Enemies that are on Full Life

lines.name: Double Vision
lines.flavourText:
For those without a home in the Vastiri, the
hot day is harsh, but the chill night is far worse.

lines.name: Spiteful Floret
lines.flavourText:
If you see the blushing tree of the northern woods,
remember: "Blossoms of red, the tree's been fed.
Blossoms of white, prepare for a fight."

explicitModifiers.text: Every 5 [Rage] also grants 5% of Damage taken [Recoup|Recouped] as Life

lines.itemId: The Blood Thorn Runeforged Wrapped Quarterstaff
lines.name: The Blood Thorn
lines.flavourText: Touch not the thorn, for only blood and pain await.

lines.name: Serle's Grit
lines.flavourText:
A common soldier from a common family kept hammering into the night
after each grueling march, his eyes afire with starlight and determination.
Few suspected that he would one day become the greatest among them.

explicitModifiers.text: Skills which [Empowered|Empower] an [Attack] have (10-20)% chance to not count that [Attack]
(40-50) to (80-100) added [Physical] [Thorns] damage per Runic Plate

lines.name: Collapsing Horizon
lines.flavourText: The edges bend, the world flexes, the infinite spills into view.

lines.name: The Last Lament
lines.flavourText:
"And here we shall remain... 
trapped in our symphony of eternal anguish.
Artist and Composer, their fates entwined for all of time."
- Adamantia Brektov, the Composer

explicitModifiers.text: (10-20)% chance to load a bolt into all [Crossbow|Crossbow] skills on Kill
[Sacrifice] 300 Life to not consume the last bolt when firing

lines.name: Voltaxic Rift
lines.flavourText:
The eldritch storm descended upon us, and bruised lightning
rained down. Metal withered and flesh melted before its
arcane power. There was no escape, no shelter. Only despair.

lines.name: Spire of Ire
lines.flavourText:
The spear was specially forged to assassinate Voll,
but Maligaro never got a chance to use it...

explicitModifiers.text: When you Consume a [Charges|Charge] [Trigger] Chaotic Surge to gain 2 [Surge|Chaos Surges]
[LifeLeech|Life Leech] recovers based on your [Chaos] damage instead of [Physical] damage

lines.name: Nebuloch
lines.flavourText:
They hoped that, trapped in its prison,
the creature would age and perish.
But time would not touch the fiend.

explicitModifiers.text: Take 100 [Chaos] damage per second per [Charges|Endurance Charge]

lines.name: Chober Chaber
lines.flavourText: The faithful may continue to serve, even after death.

explicitModifiers.text: Increases and Reductions to [Minion] Damage also affect you

lines.name: Hrimnor's Hymn
lines.flavourText:
"The crack of bone, the spray of blood.
Is there sweeter music?"
- Hrimnor of the Ezomytes.

explicitModifiers.text: [Slam] Skills you use yourself cause an additional [Aftershock]

lines.name: The Unborn Lich
lines.flavourText:
In ghastly pits beneath the world,
Kulemak grows countless new bodies,
each more powerful than the last.
Not all of his abominations survive.

explicitModifiers.text: (47-96)% increased [BuffMagnitude|Magnitude] of [UnholyMight|Unholy Might] buffs you grant
Enemies you kill have a (8-17)% chance to explode, dealing a quarter of their maximum Life as [Chaos] damage
(48-71)% increased Cast Speed when on [LowLife|Low Life]
(17-34)% increased Duration of Elemental [Ailments] on Enemies
(238-301)% increased [Spell] Damage with [Spell|Spells] that cost Life
(40-61)% of [Spell] Mana Cost [StatConversion|Converted] to Life Cost
(41-60)% chance for [Spell] Skills to fire 2 additional [Projectile|Projectiles]

lines.name: The Sentry
lines.flavourText:
The night Draven attacked,
Erian was asleep at his post.

lines.name: Mist Whisper
lines.flavourText:
Sibilant promises surrounded them in the night.
All the travelers had to give him was their devotion...

lines.name: Widowhail
lines.flavourText:
"I loosed a volley of arrows into the heart of the man
who slew my beloved. There was no satisfaction, no
healing, no revenge. There was only... emptiness."

lines.name: Lioneye's Glare
lines.flavourText:
"Kinslayer, you dishonour your own traditions to turn the tide of battle! 
Let us see which is stronger... Karui savagery or the might of the Empire!"
- General Marceus Lioneye

explicitModifiers.text: +2 metres to Dodge Roll distance if you haven't Dodge Rolled [Recently]
-1 metre to Dodge Roll distance if you've Dodge Rolled [Recently]
[Repeat|Repeatable] [Attack|Attacks] with this Bow [Repeat] +2 times if no enemies are in your [Presence|Presence]

lines.name: Atziri's Rule
lines.flavourText: Bow before her... or suffer the most gruelling death imaginable.

explicitModifiers.text: +(3-5) to Level of all [Corrupted] [Spell] Skill Gems
Spells which cost Life [Gain] (80-120)% of Damage as [Gain|Extra] [Physical] Damage

lines.name: Amor Mandragora
lines.flavourText:
A sensitive few among the first settlers of Ezomyr
followed the wisps by canoe. On a misty forested
island, Cirel of Tarth stood waiting to greet them.

explicitModifiers.text: Gain 1 [DruidicProwess|Druidic Prowess] for every 20 total Rage spent

lines.itemId: The Burden of Shadows Chiming Staff
lines.name: The Burden of Shadows
lines.flavourText:
Nothingness is loathe to relinquish its grip.
Every moment is a struggle to exist.

explicitModifiers.text: Skill Mana Costs [StatConversion|Converted] to Life Costs
Skills gain 1% of Damage as [Chaos|Chaos Damage] per 3 Life Cost

lines.name: Matsya
lines.flavourText: In our tales, and in our hearts, the rivers still flow.

lines.name: Hysseg's Claw
lines.flavourText:
In a time of great need, surrounded by Abyssals,
the Wayward Druid came to the Sun Clan's aid.
It is a debt they have never forgotten.

lines.name: Tangletongue
lines.flavourText:
"In the hands of Orbala, it made a god bleed."
- Wranga, tale-woman of the Wahida akhara

explicitModifiers.text: 10% of Skill Mana Costs [StatConversion|Converted] to Life Costs

lines.name: Splinter of Lorrata
lines.flavourText: The Baleful Gem's corruption lingers still...

explicitModifiers.text: Any number of [Poison|Poisons] from this Weapon can affect a target at the same time

lines.name: Tyranny's Grip
lines.flavourText:
The might of the Eternal Empire was formidable,
but rebels of every culture stood together as one.

lines.itemId: Pillar of the Caged God Long Quarterstaff
lines.name: Pillar of the Caged God
lines.flavourText:
Forged to rule the waves and tide
Destined to serve the monkey's paw
Strong as a tower of iron
Deft as the needle doubt

explicitModifiers.text: 1% increased Area of Effect for [Attack|Attacks] per 10 [Intelligence|Intelligence]

lines.name: Rampart Raptor
lines.flavourText:
"His approach to the gate was met with sounding trumpets
and an unfurling of banners. He never saw it coming."
- anonymous Brotherhood of Silence report

explicitModifiers.text:
Bolts fired by [Crossbow|Crossbow] [Attack|Attacks] have 100% chance to not
expend [Ammunition] if you've Reloaded [Recently]

lines.name: Olrovasara
lines.flavourText:
"True heroes grow stronger in the face of adversity."
- Fourth Tenet of the Knights of the Sun

explicitModifiers.text:
On [HitDamage|Hitting] an enemy, gains maximum added [Lightning] damage equal to
the enemy's [Power] for 20 seconds, up to a total of 500

lines.name: The Flesh Poppet
lines.flavourText:
Long ago, the witches of the Azak Tribe learned
how to tap into the flow of Vivid lifeforce to
'cooperate' with their enemies... forcefully.

explicitModifiers.text:
Copy a random [MonsterModifiers|Modifier] from each enemy in your [Presence] when
you [Shapeshift] to an Animal form
Modifiers gained this way are lost after 30 seconds or when you next [Shapeshift]

lines.name: Enezun's Charge
lines.flavourText: He alone was welcome in the sacred spaces of the Titans.

explicitModifiers.text: 25% chance to not destroy [Corpse|Corpses] when Consuming [Corpse|Corpses]

lines.name: Sadist's Mercy
lines.flavourText:
"You mortals are insidious. You repress your
evil, or deny it exists. Liars! When I open
your heads, that violence floods out."
- The Raven Trickster

explicitModifiers.text: Enemies in your [Presence] have additional [Power] equal to their [GruellingMadness|Gruelling Madness]

lines.name: Serle's Grit
lines.flavourText:
A common soldier from a common family kept hammering into the night
after each grueling march, his eyes afire with starlight and determination.
Few suspected that he would one day become the greatest among them.

explicitModifiers.text: Skills which [Empowered|Empower] an [Attack] have (10-20)% chance to not count that [Attack]
(40-50) to (80-100) added [Physical] [Thorns] damage per Runic Plate

lines.name: Ironbound
lines.flavourText:
Each crest was a Thane's word, bolted to Ivor's bow.
They would join the Count's side, or die by his hands.

explicitModifiers.text: (3-5)% increased [Block] chance per 100 total [ItemArmour|Item Armour] on [EquipArmour|Equipped Armour Items]
Hits with this weapon have (1-2) to (4-5) Added [Physical|Physical] Damage per 1% [ChanceToBlock|Block Chance]
Arrows [Return] if they have [Pierce|Pierced] a target which had [ArmourBreak|Fully Broken Armour]

lines.name: Lifesprig
lines.flavourText:
From the smallest seeds
To the tallest redwoods,
Life endures in Wraeclast.

explicitModifiers.text: [LifeLeech|Leeches] 1% of maximum Life when you Cast a [Spell|Spell]

lines.name: Death's Harp
lines.flavourText:
The mournful music of the strings,
The creaking arch, the arrow sings.
A choking cry, a rattled breath,
The Reaper's Song, the Harp of Death.

implicitModifiers.text: +50% [SurpassChance|Surpassing] chance to fire an additional Arrow

explicitModifiers.text: +(250-330)% [SurpassChance|Surpassing] chance to fire an additional Arrow

lines.name: Chainsting
lines.flavourText: The Sacred Hunt ends with mercy.

explicitModifiers.text: [DamageTypes|All Damage] from [HitDamage|Hits] with this Weapon [Contributes|Contributes] to [Pinned|Pin] Buildup

lines.name: Seeing Stars
lines.flavourText: Within lies a window.

lines.name: Tidebreaker
lines.flavourText:
The sea strikes the rock relentlessly.
Whether in one day or in ten thousand years,
eventually the rock will crumble,
and the Brine King's domain will grow.

explicitModifiers.text: [DamageTypes|All Damage] from [HitDamage|Hits] with this Weapon [Contributes|Contributes] to [Chill] [BuffMagnitude|Magnitude]

lines.name: Brain Rattler
lines.flavourText: The mind may have no limits, but the skull sure does.

explicitModifiers.text: All damage with this Weapon causes [Electrocute|Electrocution] buildup

lines.name: Widowhail
lines.flavourText:
"I loosed a volley of arrows into the heart of the man
who slew my beloved. There was no satisfaction, no
healing, no revenge. There was only... emptiness."

lines.name: Cursecarver
lines.flavourText: Lost in the Black Fen, Erian hoped that dawn would save him. He had no idea how far away the light truly was.

lines.name: Fairgraves' Curse
lines.flavourText:
The power of the Allflame rends
souls just as easily as flesh.

lines.name: Dusk Vigil
lines.flavourText: The candlemass tradition was born in a time of darkness and fear.

explicitModifiers.text: [Trigger] Ember Fusillade Skill on casting a [Spell|Spell]

lines.name: Sanguine Diviner
lines.flavourText: One way or another, it will find what it seeks.

explicitModifiers.text: 25% of [Spell] Mana Cost [StatConversion|Converted] to Life Cost

lines.name: Sire of Shards
lines.flavourText: That which was broken may yet break.

explicitModifiers.text:
[Spell|Spells] fire 4 additional [Projectile|Projectiles]
[Spell|Spells] fire [Projectile|Projectiles] in a circle

lines.name: The Empty Roar
lines.flavourText: Secrecy and silence are powers all their own.

lines.name: Double Vision
lines.flavourText:
For those without a home in the Vastiri, the
hot day is harsh, but the chill night is far worse.

explicitModifiers.text:
When you reload, triggers Gemini Surge to alternately
gain (2-6) [Surge|Cold Surges] or (2-6) [Surge|Fire Surges]

lines.name: Trephina
lines.flavourText: The art of surgery advances one mistake at a time.

explicitModifiers.text: Always deals [Critical|Critical Hits] against [HeavyStun|Heavy Stunned] Enemies

lines.name: Taryn's Shiver
lines.flavourText:
Shed by the winged beast of night,
A scaly frost-encrusted thorn.
All who feel its wintry light
Shiver in pain at the frozen dawn.

explicitModifiers.text: Enemies [Frozen|Frozen] by you take 100% increased Damage

lines.name: The Sentry
lines.flavourText:
The night Draven attacked,
Erian was asleep at his post.

lines.name: Mist Whisper
lines.flavourText:
Sibilant promises surrounded them in the night.
All the travelers had to give him was their devotion...

lines.name: Font of Power
lines.flavourText:
Tale-women may not fight directly,
for they have a much higher purpose.

explicitModifiers.text:
When a Party Member in your [Presence] Casts a [Spell], you
[Sacrifice] 20% of Mana and they [ManaLeech|Leech that Mana]

lines.name: The Searing Touch
lines.flavourText:
Burn to cinders, scar and maim,
Rule a world, bathed in flame.

explicitModifiers.text: [Ignite|Ignites] you inflict [AilmentSpread|spread] to other Enemies that stay within 1.5 metres for 1 second

lines.name: The Dark Defiler
lines.flavourText:
Rare is the Necromancer who leads
his undead armies from the front.

explicitModifiers.text: [Gain] 5% of Damage as [Chaos] Damage per Undead [Minion]

lines.name: Splinterheart
lines.flavourText:
The forests of the Vastiri held many secrets
mystical and dark. Men learned not to wander,
lest they return with a strange new purpose.

lines.name: Frostbreath
lines.flavourText:
A merciful murderer swept through the streets of Sarn
Robbing breath from the weak and worthless.

explicitModifiers.text: [DamageTypes|All Damage] from [HitDamage|Hits] with this Weapon [Contributes|Contributes] to [Freeze] Buildup

lines.name: Nazir's Judgement
lines.flavourText:
The first witch hunter knew one critical tactic:
never let your enemy have a clear moment.

lines.name: Shyaba
lines.flavourText: Be not deceived by the treachery of men.

lines.name: Earthbound
lines.flavourText: An ancient Azmeri staff, overgrown by roots...

explicitModifiers.text: [Trigger] Spark Skill on killing a [Shock|Shocked] Enemy

lines.name: Daevata's Wind
lines.flavourText:
"You killed their Golden Sekhema. The Maraketh will think of nothing
but vengeance now." - Dimos, Advisor to General Titucius

explicitModifiers.text: (30-60)% increased [Melee] Damage if you've dealt a [Projectile] [Attack] [HitDamage|Hit] in the past eight seconds
(30-60)% increased [Projectile] Damage if you've dealt a [Melee] [HitDamage|Hit] in the past eight seconds

lines.name: Sculpted Suffering
lines.flavourText:
The Abyssals were created, not born,
and every moment in the light was agony.

explicitModifiers.text: [ArmourBreak|Breaks Armour] equal to 40% of damage from [HitDamage|Hits] with this weapon
[ArmourBreak|Fully Armour Broken] enemies you kill with [HitDamage|Hits] [Shatter]

lines.name: Brynhand's Mark
lines.flavourText: The mark of the smith was widely known.

lines.name: The Blood Thorn
lines.flavourText: Touch not the thorn, for only blood and pain await.

lines.name: Slivertongue
lines.flavourText: A hundred blind heads, each seeking the taste of prey on the air.

lines.itemId: Surge of the Tide Lumbering Talisman
lines.name: Surge of the Tide
lines.flavourText:
"A traditional hatungo does not carry an axe,
it is true. But as Narumoa showed us, there
are many ways to crush one's enemy..."

explicitModifiers.text:
Every second [Slam] Skill you use while [Shapeshift|Shapeshifted] is [AncestralBoost|Ancestrally Boosted]
Every second [Strike] Skill you use while [Shapeshift|Shapeshifted] is [AncestralBoost|Ancestrally Boosted]

lines.name: Spiteful Floret
lines.flavourText:
If you see the blushing tree of the northern woods,
remember: "Blossoms of red, the tree's been fed.
Blossoms of white, prepare for a fight."

explicitModifiers.text: Every 5 [Rage] also grants 5% of Damage taken [Recoup|Recouped] as Life

lines.name: The Wicked Quill
lines.flavourText:
With a flick of the finger, their fates are written,
the pages torn to a million pieces.

explicitModifiers.text: [Spell|Spells] have a 25% chance to inflict [Withered] for 4 seconds on [HitDamage|Hit]

lines.name: Hoghunt
lines.flavourText:
There was a very clear and delicious
reason why the Ezomytes chose to
stop their flight and settle in Phaaryl.
